records.name: AOS AO3400A 30 V logic-level N-channel MOSFET
records.description: Concrete low-side switching MOSFET with guaranteed on-resistance at 2.5 V gate drive.

notes: The 5.7 A and 1.4 W ratings depend on the manufacturer test board and thermal conditions; applied dissipation remains a circuit-level check.

records.name: AOS AO3401 30 V logic-level P-channel MOSFET
records.description: Concrete default-off high-side switch with guaranteed on-resistance at 4.5 V and 2.5 V gate drive.

notes: The trusted switch model uses the 60 mOhm maximum at 4.5 V gate drive and the steady-state 125 C/W junction-to-ambient boundary.

records.name: AOS AOSS21311C 30 V logic-level P-channel MOSFET
records.description: Concrete default-off high-side switch with a 20 V gate rating and guaranteed on-resistance at 4.5 V gate drive.

notes: The trusted switch model uses the 65 mOhm maximum at 4.5 V gate drive and a conservative steady-state junction-to-ambient boundary.

records.name: AOS AOD21357 30 V logic-level P-channel MOSFET
records.description: Low-resistance high-side power switch with guaranteed 13 mOhm on-resistance at 4.5 V gate drive and a reviewed steady-state free-air thermal path.

thermal_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Datasheet steady-state TO-252 junction-to-ambient boundary on a 1 square inch FR-4 board with 2 oz copper in still air; the lower junction-to-case path requires a separately declared case temperature.
thermal_evidence.review_note: AOS AOD21357/AOI21357 Rev. 1.1 specifies 50 C/W maximum steady-state junction-to-ambient and 1.6 C/W maximum steady-state junction-to-case resistance.

notes: The trusted switch model uses the 13 mOhm maximum at 4.5 V gate drive and the steady-state 50 C/W junction-to-ambient boundary; the 70 A and 78 W headline ratings require the manufacturer case-temperature conditions.

records.name: onsemi FQP47P06 60 V P-channel power MOSFET
records.description: High-side power switch with guaranteed 26 mOhm on-resistance at -10 V gate drive.

notes: The 47 A and 160 W ratings require the manufacturer case-temperature conditions; circuit thermal analysis uses the reviewed package path and actual switched-load dissipation.

records.name: onsemi RFD16N05LSM 50 V logic-level N-channel MOSFET
records.description: Low-side power switch with guaranteed on-resistance at 4 V gate drive and a reviewed free-air thermal path.

thermal_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Datasheet free-air TO-252 junction-to-ambient boundary; the lower junction-to-case path requires a separately declared case temperature.
thermal_evidence.review_note: onsemi RFD16N05LSM datasheet specifies 100 C/W maximum junction-to-ambient and 2.083 C/W maximum junction-to-case resistance.

notes: The guaranteed 56 mOhm path applies at 4 V gate drive; thermal ratings remain boundary-dependent.

records.name: Infineon IRLZ44N 55 V logic-level N-channel MOSFET
records.description: Concrete through-hole low-side power switch with specified 4.5 V gate-drive performance.

thermal_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Free-air TO-220 junction-to-ambient boundary from the manufacturer datasheet; the lower junction-to-case value requires a separately declared case temperature.
thermal_evidence.review_note: Infineon IRLZ44N datasheet records 62 C/W maximum junction-to-ambient and 1.8 C/W maximum junction-to-case thermal resistance.

notes: The 47 A current and 83 W dissipation ratings require the manufacturer test conditions and thermal design; applied SOA and junction temperature remain circuit-level checks.

records.name: onsemi SS34FA 3 A 40 V Schottky rectifier
records.description: Thermally qualified recirculation diode for low-voltage inductive loads.

thermal_evidence.mounting_assumptions: JESD51-3 recommended thermal test board: SS34FA mounted on a 76.2 mm by 114.3 mm FR-4 PCB.
thermal_evidence.review_note: onsemi SS36FA/D Rev. 3 specifies the SS34FA junction range and the package junction-to-ambient path; board realization must preserve an equivalent or better thermal boundary.

notes: The 152 C/W junction-to-ambient rating is valid only for the manufacturer-declared JESD51-3 FR-4 test board boundary.

records.name: Diodes Incorporated B340LA 3 A 40 V Schottky rectifier
records.description: Concrete recirculation diode for low-voltage inductive loads.

notes: The 3 A average-current rating depends on terminal temperature and PCB thermal design; applied temperature remains a circuit-level check.

records.name: Diodes Incorporated B560C 5 A 60 V Schottky rectifier
records.description: Concrete high-current recirculation diode for protected power switching.

thermal_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Manufacturer thermal test boundary: glass-epoxy substrate with 1 oz/ft^2 copper and a 30 mm by 30 mm copper pad.
thermal_evidence.review_note: Diodes Incorporated B560C(LS) DS44488 Rev. 7 specifies 15 C/W typical junction-to-lead and 50 C/W typical junction-to-ambient thermal resistance under the declared PCB boundary.

notes: The 5 A average-current rating requires the manufacturer-specified terminal temperature and PCB copper; applied temperature and dissipation remain circuit-level checks.

records.name: TI TXS0102DCU two-bit bidirectional level translator
records.description: Two-channel open-drain translator with VCC isolation and Ioff partial-power-down support.

side_a_voltage.conditions: TI TXS0102 Rev L recommended operating conditions

side_b_voltage.conditions: TI TXS0102 Rev L recommended operating conditions

translator_evidence.review_note: VCC isolation and Ioff support bound the unpowered and disabled high-impedance state; enable propagation time is not promoted as fabrication proof.

notes: TI specifies 2 Mbps maximum data rate for open-drain operation, VCC isolation, and Ioff partial-power-down support.

records.name: TI LM317AT/NOPB adjustable linear regulator
records.description: Industrial-temperature three-terminal adjustable 1.5 A regulator for higher-voltage open-set supply composition.

notes: TI specifies a -40 C to 125 C operating range; thermal dissipation and minimum-load-current checks remain fabrication-stage obligations.

records.name: TI LM317T adjustable linear regulator
records.description: Three-terminal adjustable 1.5 A regulator for higher-voltage open-set supply composition.

notes: Thermal dissipation and minimum-load-current checks remain fabrication-stage obligations.

records.name: Analog Devices LT3080IST low-dropout programmable current regulator
records.description: Industrial-temperature SOT-223 current-reference regulator with internally tied IN and VCONTROL pins, suitable for the reviewed two-terminal current-source topology.

thermal_evidence.mounting_assumptions: SOT-223 output tab soldered to the OUT copper area; the catalog boundary uses the package headline thermal resistance and physical design retains copper-spreading as an explicit obligation.
thermal_evidence.review_note: LT3080 Rev. C specifies 55 C/W junction-to-ambient and 15 C/W junction-to-case for the ST package; its board-area table ranges from 48 C/W to 62 C/W.

notes: The SOT-223 package ties IN and VCONTROL internally, so the trusted model uses the 1.2 V maximum VCONTROL dropout specified at 100 mA.
The trusted model uses the full-temperature 9.8 uA to 10.2 uA SET-current range and the SOT-223 full-temperature plus-or-minus 6 mV output-offset bound.
The data sheet explicitly documents the two-terminal current-source application using the SET/OUT resistor network.

records.name: Analog Devices LT3092MPST programmable current source
records.description: Industrial-temperature 0.5 mA to 200 mA two-terminal current source whose external SET and OUT resistor network programs load current.

thermal_evidence.mounting_assumptions: Conservative natural-convection SOT-223 estimate without credit for the data-sheet best-case 2500 mm2 2 oz copper test board.
thermal_evidence.review_note: Package thermal limits are used with solved worst-case dissipation; any improvement from dedicated OUT copper remains a physical-design obligation.

notes: The installed KiCad LT3080xST symbol is used only as a reviewed pin-compatible SET/OUT/IN SOT-223 template; the schematic value and catalog identity remain LT3092MPST#PBF.
The trusted model deliberately uses the full-temperature 9.8 uA to 10.2 uA SET-current range and the 1.65 V maximum 200 mA dropout bound.

records.name: Analog Devices MAX6006AEUR+T 1.25 V nanopower shunt reference
records.description: Industrial-temperature 1.25 V nanopower shunt reference for low-burden floating set-point generation.

thermal_evidence.mounting_assumptions: JEDEC JESD51-7 multilayer-board SOT-23 thermal characterization.
thermal_evidence.review_note: The reference dissipates only its solved shunt voltage times bias current in this topology.

notes: The output-voltage uncertainty combines the 0.2% initial limit with 30 ppm/C over the full -40 C to 85 C rated range.
SOT-23 pin 3 is an internally connected test point that the datasheet permits leaving unconnected.

records.name: Analog Devices LT1634AIS8-1.25 precision shunt reference
records.description: Industrial-temperature 1.25 V micropower shunt reference for precision floating set-point generation.

thermal_evidence.review_note: The reference dissipates only its solved shunt voltage times bias current in this topology.

notes: The trusted uncertainty bound combines the reviewed initial-accuracy and temperature-drift limits over the supported industrial range.
